# team_100 — EyalAmit.co.il-2026 SEO/GEO/AEO Execution Plan (Work-Package Backlog)

> **Part of the completion round.** The whole-project launch backlog (every gap & remainder, mapped to M5–M7) is the SSoT `COMPLETION-ROUND-ROADMAP-2026-06-20.md` (its §3 = this plan).

**Project:** EyalAmit.co.il-2026 · **Owner:** team_100 (SEO/GEO delivery lead) · **Date:** 2026-06-20
**Sources reconciled:** LOD400-SEO-GEO-OPTIMIZATION-2026-06-19.md (T1–T21) + BUSINESS-NAP-AND-HOURS-2026-06-16.md (NAP SSoT) + GAP RESEARCH (image, video, backlinks/digital-PR, migration+commerce, CRO).
**Repo ground-truth re-verified 2026-06-20** against `site/wp-content/themes/ea-eyalamit/` and `site/wp-content/mu-plugins/`: zero JSON-LD; no `robots.txt`/sitemap in `site/` root; analytics `__PENDING_EYAL__`; `EA_WAVE2_CF7_FORM_ID = 0`; bare `wa.me` links; A/B test hides `.ea-whatsapp-float` via `display:none` for `form_only`; hero default = single `ghost-white` pill; live 301 mu-plugin sends `/צור-קשר/ → /contact/` while the two stale exports disagree; staging noindex gated on `upress.link`; `hub/dist/robots.txt` is a block-all artifact.

> ## ⚠ SUPERSEDED PREMISE — Yoast is the live engine (see canonical WP Appendix B)
> This exec plan was written around a "theme-native, zero JSON-LD, hand-roll a connected `@graph`" premise. **That premise is dead.** Live re-verification (team_100, 2026-06-21, against staging) confirms **Yoast SEO v27.8 is the live schema engine** and already emits a JSON-LD `@graph` + OG/Twitter/canonical tags + the `/sitemap_index.xml` sitemap. The corrected, **IMPLEMENTED** approach is to **EXTEND Yoast's single `@graph`** via the `wpseo_schema_graph` filter (mu-plugin `ea-w2-seo-schema.php`) — **NOT** to build a second/competing engine. Read every "hand-rolled JSON-LD `@graph`" reference below (esp. **WP-02**) as **"EXTEND Yoast's `@graph`."** Canonical reference: `WP-S004-P001-WP000-SEO-GEO-FINALIZATION-2026-06-20.md`, Appendix B.

---

## 1. Executive summary

This is a **deliberately low-volume Hebrew RTL niche**. Head-term ranking will not move the business; the LOD400 plan already established that. The whole effort is a portfolio of **cheap, high-leverage entity-grounding + earned-corroboration + conversion-capture** moves, with the **sleep-apnea/snoring bridge (BMJ 2006 Puhan RCT)** as the single largest organic-and-AI-citation lever. The GAP RESEARCH adds four channels the LOD400 plan under-covered — **image/multimodal SEO, video/YouTube (AI Overviews cite YouTube more than medical sites for health queries), earned digital-PR/unlinked-mention corroboration, and on-page conversion-rate optimization** — plus the **migration cutover discipline** and **honest non-WooCommerce Product schema** that the build needs to ship safely.

We collapse the combined surface into **13 work packages** across three phases. The ruthless ordering principle: **every visitor is precious, so fix the leaking funnel before pouring more traffic in.** WP-01 (CRO repair: un-hide WhatsApp, fire GA4, pre-fill wa.me, wire the form) is the highest-ROI work in the entire plan because the site is currently **suppressing one-third of leads and measuring zero conversions** — pure waste regardless of traffic. WP-02 (JSON-LD `@graph`) is the foundational machine-grounding layer everything schema-shaped depends on. WP-03 (the sleep-apnea pillar + press-kit data hook) is the content/PR/video flywheel hub. The cutover (WP-12, Track B) is sequenced last and gated, because it is the one irreversible, sensitive operation.

**Two hard reconciliations carried forward (not re-litigated):** (1) **NAP/business name** = "המרכז לטיפול בנשימה באמצעות דיג'רידו" (cbDIDG), drop "סטודיו נשימה מעגלית", E.164 +972-52-482-2842, address עמל 8 ב' פרדס חנה, hours Sun–Thu 09–19 / Fri 09–14 / Sat closed / by-appointment — confirmed from the SSoT, D6=SHOW address. (2) **Yoast is the live schema engine** (D4 — superseded premise; see banner) — Yoast SEO v27.8 emits the `@graph` + OG/Twitter/canonical + the `/sitemap_index.xml` sitemap; the theme/mu-plugin (`ea-w2-seo-schema.php`) **EXTENDS** Yoast's single `@graph` via `wpseo_schema_graph`; never run two schema engines.

**What we will NOT do (de-prioritized, do not spend budget):** `llms.txt`; self-serving Review/AggregateRating schema on the business entity; FAQPage *for Google rich results* (deprecated — keep it for AI extraction only); YouTube Shorts; mass video production; Merchant Center / Shopping feed / UCP (inquiry-only site); fake/zero prices on "מחיר לפי התאמה" products; chasing head terms; bought guest posts / niche edits / PBNs (devalued by the March-2026 core update).

## 2. Phase overview

| Phase | Theme | Work packages |
|---|---|---|
| **P1 — Quick wins** (ship first; low effort, high/immediate ROI) | Stop the bleeding + cheapest discovery unlocks | WP-01, WP-04, WP-05, WP-09 |
| **P2 — Foundational** (medium effort, builds the durable machine layer) | Entity grounding, the pillar/PR flywheel, meta/image/commerce | WP-02, WP-03, WP-06, WP-07, WP-08 |
| **P3 — Ongoing / off-site / cutover** | Renewable freshness, earned corroboration, measurement, the gated go-live | WP-10, WP-11, WP-13 (ongoing) + **WP-12 (Track B cutover, gated, runs at go-live)** |

## 4. Per-WP one-paragraph specs

**WP-01 — Conversion-path repair + analytics un-gate (P1, Track A, the single highest-ROI item).** The site is actively wasting hard-won visitors: the A/B test sets `display:none` on `.ea-whatsapp-float` for the `form_only` variant (≈1/3 of sessions see *no* WhatsApp while the only working lead path), GA4 never loads (`__PENDING_EYAL__` gate), every `wa.me` link is bare with no `?text=`, and the contact form posts to `action="#"` with `EA_WAVE2_CF7_FORM_ID = 0` (silent void). This WP pauses the WhatsApp-hiding A/B branch (show WhatsApp to 100%), splits the analytics gate so GA4 (G-MRXESK7QJF) fires independently of the still-pending Clarity, adds a `ea_wave2_wa_url($context)` helper that appends page-aware Hebrew pre-fill text everywhere, wires the real CF7 form (or hides the dead form and leads with WhatsApp+tel:), promotes the hero CTA to a primary-filled intro-call pill plus a WhatsApp pill, adds tappable WhatsApp+tel+NAP/hours to the footer, and cuts the form to ≤3 fields with phone optional. It depends on D7 (therapy-lead conversion — confirmed) and D11 (GA4 ID — confirmed G-MRXESK7QJF).

**WP-02 — EXTEND Yoast's `@graph` (P2, Track A, foundational machine layer).** ⚠ Superseded premise: Yoast SEO v27.8 is the live schema engine and already emits a connected JSON-LD `@graph` (see the banner above + WP Appendix B). Do NOT build a second engine. **EXTEND Yoast's single `@graph`** via the `wpseo_schema_graph` filter (mu-plugin `ea-w2-seo-schema.php`) to add: `#person` (Eyal, knowsAbout, worksFor→#business, sameAs chain led by he.wikipedia), `#business` (ProfessionalService — NOT HealthAndBeautyBusiness per D5 — with locked NAP, openingHoursSpecification, areaServed per D2), Service-per-route, FAQPage (generated byte-identical from the same arrays the visible accordions render), BreadcrumbList, plus the GAP-research additions: `ImageObject` nodes (`#image-eyal-portrait`, `#image-studio`, product/Mukesh shots with name/contentUrl/Hebrew description/author/creditText/license/acquireLicensePage, cross-referenced as `primaryImageOfPage` and `#person.image`/`#service-*.image`) and `VideoObject` hooks consumed by WP-07. It explicitly honors the prohibitions (no `areaServed:Israel` default, no precise geo until D2, no self-serving AggregateRating, no VideoObject on the muted hero loop). Gated by D1 (NAP), D2 (geo), D5 (subtype). This WP is the dependency root for WP-03, WP-07, WP-08, WP-10.

**WP-03 — Sleep-apnea pillar + press-kit data hook + answer-first tightening (P2, Track A, content flywheel hub).** The largest adjacent-demand lever no Hebrew site owns. Build `/treatment/sleep-apnea-snoring` via the `inc/wave2-w2-04*` block pattern with a 40–100w direct-answer lede, the **named BMJ 2006 Puhan RCT + JCSM wind-instrument meta-analysis** with outbound links, the Ig-Nobel-2017 fact, and Article+FAQPage+`citation` JSON-LD (nodes from WP-02). Critically, add a **"לעיתונאים / מקורות" press-kit sub-block** (40–60w plain-language RCT summary + a quotable expert quote + who/where line) — this is the single asset every WP-11 earned-mention tactic points back to, and the embed slot for the WP-07 explainer video. In the same pass, tighten the existing answer-first H2s on /treatment (primary), /method, /sound-healing, /lessons to self-contained 40–60w answers with explicit owned facts, and mirror the expert quote + a "בתקשורת" strip onto `/eyal-amit`. Depends on WP-02. No new decision gate beyond D9 (health-claim conservatism).

**WP-04 — Crawl-policy + meta head pack (P1, Track A).** Bundles the cheap, independent head-output wins: a real `site/` root `robots.txt` (replacing the block-all `hub/dist/robots.txt` artifact) that allows Googlebot/Bingbot + the AI citation/user bots (OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, Claude-SearchBot, Claude-User, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User — re-verify exact UA tokens at build) and declares `Sitemap: https://www.eyalamit.co.il/sitemap_index.xml` (the canonical Yoast sitemap, served 200 — robots + GSC + the legacy 301 all point here); per-route `<title>` + ~150–160-char meta description + self-referencing `rel=canonical` (via `pre_get_document_title` + canonical print in `inc/wave2-w2-09.php`); OG + Twitter cards per route (og:image 1200×630, currently MISSING) sized to double as Pinterest source; reciprocal per-pair hreflang fix with /en getting `lang=en`+`dir=ltr`; and BreadcrumbList visible UI on inner pages (the BreadcrumbList node itself lives in WP-02). Gated by D3 (GPTBot allow — recommend allow) for the robots posture. The robots.txt + sitemap directive is later verified live by WP-12.

**WP-05 — Image-discovery hygiene + WebP/LCP pass (P1, Track A).** The repo has zero image-discovery infrastructure. Convert hero/portrait/logo/book/product/Mukesh JPGs to WebP served via `<picture>`/srcset with explicit width/height (hero poster, NOT the `<video>`, stays `loading=eager fetchpriority=high`; everything below-fold `loading=lazy`); promote the bio/portrait figcaption from `ea-sr-only` (hidden) to a visible keyword-natural Hebrew caption and add visible captions under studio/Mukesh/didgeridoo photos (captions are a documented Google image-ranking + AI-multimodal input); fix weak alt (replace `alt=get_the_title()` on blog cards, audit every `alt=''`, stop reusing `'כריכת '+title`); add an image XML sitemap (extend Yoast's sitemap output rather than standing up a second sitemap engine, per D4) referenced from the WP-04 robots.txt; and ship a one-page upload-time intake checklist (Latin descriptive filename + Hebrew keyword in alt + visible Hebrew caption) so every new photo ships correct. The `ImageObject` schema half lives in WP-02; `primaryImageOfPage` wiring is shared. Sharpens LOD400 T17 with the discovery-format angle.

**WP-06 — NAP lock + footer brand-string fix + local/geo layer (P2, Track A).** Lock the single canonical NAP byte-identically before any citation exists, and strip the demoted "סטודיו נשימה מעגלית" from the footer brand string. Surface the visible NAP + service-area block (Pardes Hanna, "מכל קצוות הארץ", by-appointment) on /contact and footer, weave geo phrasing into /treatment + /sound-healing answer blocks, and ensure schema `areaServed` (WP-02) equals the GBP service area (WP-09). This is the on-site half of the NAP SSoT; the off-site mirroring (דפי זהב/B144, זאפ, Waze, Facebook + niche indexes) is WP-09/WP-11. Gated by D1 (closed: lead with cbDIDG name) and D6 (closed: SHOW address). Depends on WP-09 (GBP) for round-trip consistency.

**WP-07 — Video channel: facade embeds + transcripts + VideoObject (P2, Track A).** Real video surfaces already exist in the theme as empty/decorative slots (home dashboard placeholder, treatment-overview embed slot, Mukesh `.ea-qr-embed--video` rule). Build a lightweight **facade helper** (thumbnail + play button; real `youtube-nocookie.com` iframe loads only on click) so video content can ship without regressing the LCP/INP budget; add a **full visible human-corrected Hebrew transcript** beneath every meaningful embed (source = YouTube auto-captions) injecting named entities (cbDIDG, Mukesh, Pardes Hanna, BMJ) so spoken content becomes extractable answer text; wire the Mukesh documentary trailer into the heritage block as a real facade embed (turns a decorative slot into a first-hand E-E-A-T experience asset); and emit `VideoObject` ONLY for real watchable embeds — nested as the `video` property of the page's Article/BlogPosting node (never standalone here, never on the muted hero loop), with chapters mirrored as `hasPart` Clip / `SeekToAction`. The ONE 5–20min sleep-apnea explainer is the video twin of WP-03's pillar. Depends on WP-02 (nodes), WP-03 (embed home).

**WP-08 — Honest commerce schema + content-led buying guide (P2, Track A).** The shop is inquiry-only: 5 regular WP pages with `ea_product_price` meta, CTA routing to `/contact?subject=product-<slug>`. Emit `Product` + `Offer` JSON-LD server-side from the same `ea_product_price` meta the page renders — numeric price + ILS + availability where set, **OMIT the offers node entirely where it is the "מחיר לפי התאמה" fallback** (never a fake/zero price; rely on name/image/description so the page is still entity-grounded). Pair it with a content-led buying guide ("איך לבחור", "אגבה מול במבוק מול פיברגלאס", "איזה טון למתחיל") on the /didgeridoos hub so the shop wins buying-research + AI-shopping-answer queries instead of competing transactionally. Explicitly NO Merchant Center / Shopping feed / UCP. Depends on WP-02 (@graph). Gated by D8 (products = content-led secondary — confirmed).

**WP-09 — Off-site authority kickoff (P1, Track A, owner-dependent, start immediately in parallel).** No-code/owner-side moves that compound slowly so they start day one: claim + complete the **Google Business Profile** (closest-fit primary category from the IL picker + secondaries, exact Hebrew service terms, ≤750-char description, SHOW address per D6, by-appointment, no set hours, keyworded photos + short video); create the **Wikidata item** (occupation, employer, Pardes Hanna, sameAs to site + he.wikipedia + YouTube + Facebook) and link the existing he.wikipedia article to it; claim the **youdidgeridoo.com / iDIDJ / DidjNet** niche-directory listings (closes the concrete gap where Buchan/Vak/Pelleg are listed and Eyal is not); and run the **YouTube channel-side metadata pass** (keyword in first 60 chars of title / 150 of description, 3-block descriptions, timestamped chapters, corrected Hebrew captions). Every live profile URL feeds the `#person` `sameAs` chain in WP-02. Gated by D1/D6 (both closed). Depends on WP-06 (NAP) for byte-identical consistency.

**WP-10 — Blog hub-and-spoke cluster + freshness (P3, Track A, ongoing).** The only renewable-freshness + topical-authority engine. Build the spoke layer (circular-breathing-vs-rebirthing disambiguation — protects the entity from being merged with the rebirthing market by AI engines and validates the נשימה-מעגלית demotion; "מהי שיטת cbDIDG"; the BMJ/sleep-apnea spoke feeding WP-03) as BlogPosting nodes with `author=#person`, accurate datePublished/dateModified, visible "עודכן לאחרונה" date, and hub↔spoke + lateral internal links. 10 well-structured clustered articles beat 100 scattered. Depends on WP-02, WP-03. Auto-archive expired event/workshop content so the sitemap lastmod stays honest (feeds WP-12).

**WP-11 — Earned digital-PR + reviews engine + unlinked-mention corroboration (P3, Track A, ongoing, owner-dependent).** In 2026 unlinked brand mentions correlate ~3x more strongly with AI citation than backlinks, and the March-2026 core update devalued bought links — so this is a genuine-earned-media motion, NOT guest posts. Run a tiny targeted Hebrew digital-PR pitch to OSA-covering health/wellness desks using the WP-03 press-kit hook; secure 2–4 Hebrew podcast/interview appearances/year (בואו נדבר Wellness, הפודוסקופ, תחושת בטן); stand up the **policy-safe reviews engine** (no-incentive, no-gating, every-client post-session ask from their own device, ~3–10/month, owner reply ≤24h, never חינם/הנחה/הגרלה); list Eyal on high-relevance Hebrew practitioner indexes (Infomed, mazati, B144) + event platforms (FindMyCenter, Kolsadna, Basalon) with byte-identical NAP; expand the Mukesh memorial into a link-magnet lineage hub and notify the global+Israeli community; and set up a thin opportunistic Qwoted/Featured English expert profile. All coverage lands in the `/eyal-amit` "בתקשורת" strip + the mention-log in `_COMMUNICATION/team_100/`. Depends on WP-03 (press kit), WP-06/WP-09 (NAP + GBP).

**WP-12 — Staging→production cutover (P2, Track B, gated, runs at go-live — the one sensitive/irreversible operation).** Same-domain in-place re-platform (base_url unchanged, www canonical). Freeze ONE redirect SSoT: declare `ea-w209-legacy-301-redirects.php` (regenerated by `gen_htaccess_301_from_decisions.py` from `redirects-301-eyal-final-2026-05-27.json`) the sole live mechanism, and quarantine/regenerate the two stale exports that currently DISAGREE (they send `/צור-קשר/` → `/` and studio sub-pages lazily → `/` instead of the live mu-plugin's correct topical targets). Build the consolidated migration inventory from multiple sources (135-decision JSON + legacy mapping + GSC top pages + GA4 landing pages + wp-sitemap), classify each URL (keep-200 / 301 / 410 / QR-protected-200 — the 49 `/qr/` URLs MUST stay 200), run a post-deploy list-mode redirect+404+chain audit (every 301 = single hop to a 200, no chains), verify the staging-noindex mu-plugin no-ops on production (host check + WP_HOME/WP_SITEURL assertion + fetch 8+ live URLs confirming no `noindex`), publish the production `robots.txt` (NOT the block-all artifact; verify CDN/WAF doesn't 403 the AI UAs), and resubmit `/sitemap_index.xml` (the canonical Yoast sitemap, served 200; the legacy `/wp-sitemap.xml` 301s to it correctly) in GSC while monitoring Coverage/Crawl-Stats/Page-Indexing for 2–4 weeks. Captures the GSC/GA4 baseline. Depends on WP-04 (robots/meta), WP-13 (analytics live for inventory + baseline). The memorial 301 target is CLOSED in code (`/eyal-amit/mokesh-dahiman/`, served 200; `/about/moksha/` + `/mokesh-dahiman/` are 301 SOURCES → it). Gated by D10 only for the memorial CONTENT (EYL-2 full-film + facts/dates/images).

**WP-13 — Measurement, KPI baseline + quarterly AI-citation audit (P3, Track A, ongoing).** The #1 goal (AI-driven organic) is unmeasurable until conversions fire. Extend `ea-ab-testing.js` so intro-call CTA clicks, WhatsApp opens, and form submits all map to one `generate_lead` GA4 event segmented by landing page + AI referrer (`chatgpt.com`, `perplexity.ai`, `gemini.google.com`, `bing.com`); connect/verify the GSC property; set the GSC + GA4 baseline at the WP-12 cutover (staging numbers are artifacts); and stand up a quarterly manual AI-citation audit (does ChatGPT/Perplexity/AI-Overviews name Eyal for "טיפול בדיג'רידו", "דיג'רידו לדום נשימה בשינה", "מהי שיטת cbDIDG") plus a running earned-mention log. Depends on WP-01 (GA4 firing). The analytics-firing half is in WP-01; this WP is the funnel-instrumentation + baseline + audit layer.

---

## 5. Decision gates (carried, with recommendations — confirm, do not re-litigate)

| ID | Question | Recommendation | Blocks |
|---|---|---|---|
| D1 | Canonical NAP & business name | Lead with "המרכז לטיפול בנשימה באמצעות דיג'רידו / cbDIDG"; drop "סטודיו נשימה מעגלית". E.164 +972-52-482-2842 | WP-02, WP-06, WP-09 |
| D2 | areaServed / geo | Bounded GeoCircle around Pardes Hanna (north/center), matched to GBP; NOT areaServed:Israel; no precise geo until lat/long supplied | WP-02 |
| D3 | GPTBot allow vs block | Allow (OAI-SearchBot/ChatGPT-User allowed regardless); log it | WP-04 |
| D4 | Schema engine ownership | Yoast IS the live schema engine; the theme/mu-plugin (`ea-w2-seo-schema.php`) EXTENDS it via `wpseo_schema_graph`; any competing plugin's schema module OFF — never two graph engines | (all schema/meta WPs) |
| D5 | Business schema subtype | ProfessionalService + Person (NOT HealthAndBeautyBusiness) | WP-02 |
| D6 | GBP address display | SHOW (home studio is client-visited); no set hours, by-appointment attribute — NAP SSoT already supplies it, confirm only | WP-06, WP-09 |
| D7 | Primary conversion goal | Therapy lead → intro call | WP-01, WP-13 |
| D8 | Books/products role | Products = content-led secondary, inquiry-only; books = authority layer | WP-08 |
| D9 | Health-claim conservatism | No cure/efficacy; cite mechanism (BMJ); keep visible disclaimer + "התייעצו עם איש מקצוע רפואי" | WP-03, WP-10 |
| D10 | Mukesh memorial — slug + content | Slug CLOSED in code (canonical `/eyal-amit/mokesh-dahiman/`; `/about/moksha/` + `/mokesh-dahiman/` are 301 SOURCES). Only memorial CONTENT (EYL-2 full-film + facts/dates/images) remains open/owner-gated — pending Eyal | WP-07, WP-12 |
| D11 | GA4 ID source-of-truth | Reconcile in-theme `__PENDING_EYAL__` to G-MRXESK7QJF + split the gate so GA4 fires without Clarity | WP-01, WP-13 |
| D12 | Verify Hebrew keyword volumes | Verify in GSC/Keyword Planner before sizing content spend (volumes are SERP-inferred) | WP-10 (content sizing) |
| D13 (new) | Is English a target audience at all? | Only one /en page exists. Recommend: treat EN as out-of-scope for the Hebrew therapy long-tail; keep /en correct (hreflang/lang/dir per WP-04) but do NOT invest content in it — the Qwoted English channel (WP-11) is bonus-only | WP-04, WP-11 |

---

## 6. Measurement & KPIs (how we will KNOW organic traffic grew)

- **Unblock first (WP-01 + WP-13):** split the GA4 gate so GA4 fires; verify the GSC property covers `https://www.eyalamit.co.il`. True SEO/CWV numbers are unmeasurable until the WP-12 cutover (staging is noindex) — set the baseline AT cutover, measure deltas after.
- **Classic-search (GSC):** organic clicks/impressions; position + impressions for the question-form long-tail and geo terms; clicks to /treatment, /method, the sleep-apnea pillar; breadcrumb rich-result status; field CWV pass rate post-cutover.
- **AI-discovery (GA4 + manual):** referral sessions from chatgpt.com / perplexity.ai / gemini.google.com / bing.com; AI-assisted landing pages; lead-source by landing page; quarterly manual citation checks (does an engine name Eyal for the three target queries).
- **Conversion (the core path):** `generate_lead` events (intro-call / WhatsApp open / form submit) segmented by landing page + referrer; GBP actions (calls, directions, review velocity ~3–10/month, owner-reply ≤24h).
- **Earned corroboration (WP-11):** running mention-log with the NAP form of every earned mention/link; quarterly AI-name check.

---

## 7. "What unblocks what" — dependency view

```
WP-01 (CRO repair + GA4) ──────────────► WP-13 (funnel instrumentation + baseline)
                                              │
WP-09 (GBP/Wikidata/dirs/YT) ──► WP-06 (NAP lock + geo) ──► WP-02 (@graph) ─┬─► WP-03 (sleep-apnea pillar + press kit)
       │ (sameAs feeds WP-02)                │                              ├─► WP-07 (video facade + VideoObject)
       │                                     │                              ├─► WP-08 (Product/Offer + buying guide)
       │                                     │                              └─► WP-10 (blog cluster / BlogPosting)
       │                                     │
WP-04 (robots/meta/OG/hreflang) ─────────────┴──────────────► WP-12 (Track B cutover, gated, go-live)
WP-05 (WebP/LCP/alt + ImageObject half) ──► WP-02 (ImageObject nodes) ──────► WP-12 (verify live)
WP-03 (press kit) ──► WP-11 (digital-PR + reviews + mentions) ──► WP-09/WP-06 (NAP/GBP round-trip)
WP-13 (analytics live) ──► WP-12 (inventory sources + baseline capture)
```

**Critical path:** WP-09 → WP-06 → WP-02 → {WP-03, WP-07, WP-08, WP-10}. **Independent / parallelizable now:** WP-01, WP-04, WP-05, WP-09 (start day one). **Last + gated:** WP-12 (the one irreversible Track B operation; needs WP-04 robots, WP-13 analytics, and D10).

---

*This is the document team_100 executes from. P1 ships first (stop the funnel leak + cheapest discovery unlocks), P2 builds the durable entity/content/commerce machine, P3 runs the renewable freshness + earned-corroboration + measurement layers, and WP-12 gates the go-live.*

---

## Appendix — pre-build corrections (completeness critic, 2026-06-20)

The plan above was stress-tested against the live repo. **Apply these before/during build** — several are hard build-blockers, not nits:

### 🔴 Blockers / must-fix
- WP-12 mis-scopes the QR surface and it collides with WP-07. Repo truth: there are 48 seeded WP pages /qr/qr1/../qr/qr48/ (ea-w2-07-qr-seed-once.php) plus the parent /qr/ — those are the real 200s. The legacy /qr/פרק-א/ is correctly 410'd in the live mu-plugin, NOT kept 200. The plan's blanket 'the 49 /qr/ URLs MUST stay 200' is wrong and would, if executed literally, try to keep a URL alive that the SSoT 410s. Worse: those 48 QR pages embed RAW YouTube iframes (ea-w2-07-qr-content-data.php) — a real video surface with an LCP/INP cost that WP-07 (facade embeds, transcripts, VideoObject) never enumerates. WP-07 only names the home dashboard, treatment-overview, and the single Mukesh slot. Fix: WP-12 must state 48 qr* pages keep-200 + parent /qr/ keep-200 + /qr/פרק-א/ stays 410; and WP-07 (or WP-05) must cover the 48 raw QR iframes (facade-convert or at minimum lazy/transcript), since they are the single largest existing video footprint on the site.
- WP-03's chosen URL is incompatible with the injection mechanism it is told to reuse. The plan builds /treatment/sleep-apnea-snoring as a nested CHILD page 'via the inc/wave2-w2-04* pattern,' but wave2-w2-04.php matches top-level pages ONLY (lines 48-49, 502-503: it bails unless 0 === post_parent). A child page under /treatment will never receive the W2-04 content/blocks/JSON-LD injection. This is a hard build blocker hidden inside a 'reuse the pattern' instruction. Decision needed and absent: either (a) make the pillar a top-level page (e.g. /sleep-apnea-snoring) to fit the existing injector, or (b) explicitly scope code work to extend the injector to accept a parent_slug. As written WP-03 is not buildable.
- ✅ CLOSED (sitemap reconciliation / DEC-SEO-B2). The earlier "wp-sitemap.xml vs sitemap_index.xml contradiction / post-cutover 404" concern is STALE — live re-verification (team_100, 2026-06-21) shows **`/sitemap_index.xml` is served 200 by Yoast** (the live engine), and `/wp-sitemap.xml` **301s to `/sitemap_index.xml`** correctly. Canonical sitemap = **`/sitemap_index.xml`**: the robots `Sitemap:` directive, the GSC submission, and the legacy 301 (`/מפת-אתר-site-map/` => `/sitemap_index.xml`) all name the SAME URL, and that legacy 301 is CORRECT. No alias and no fix are needed; this decision is CLOSED.
- WP-01 is mis-scoped on the contact form: the wiring it calls 'missing' already exists. ea-w2-15-cf7-contact-form-once.php already creates the CF7 form AND wires it through the ea_wave2_cf7_form_id filter that wave2-stage-b.php reads (lines 112/347). The only reason form_id resolves to 0 is that the seeder is gated on class_exists('WPCF7_ContactForm') — i.e. CF7 must be ACTIVE on the server. So the real blocker is a server/ops dependency (activate CF7 + deliverability/SMTP + spam protection on a YMYL lead form), not theme code. WP-01 also says 'cut the form to ≤3 fields, phone optional' but the seeder ships a 5-field form (name/phone/email/subject/message) with email required and phone optional — reducing it means editing the seeder, which is unstated. WP-01 should split into: (a) confirm CF7 active + test a live submission reaches Eyal's inbox (an acceptance criterion currently absent — 'wire the form' is unverifiable), and (b) trim the seeder fields.
- No acceptance criterion verifies leads actually arrive. The entire plan's #1 goal is therapy leads, yet there is no end-to-end deliverability test anywhere: no check that a CF7 submission lands in Eyal's inbox (not spam), no check that the GA4 generate_lead event actually records, no fallback if email silently fails. WP-01/WP-13 instrument the click but nothing proves the lead is received. Add an explicit 'submit a real test lead via each path (form, wa.me prefilled, tel:) and confirm receipt + event fire' gate — this is the single most consequential unverified assumption in the plan.
- Decision gate D10 (Mukesh memorial facts) is sequenced as a late blocker on WP-07 and WP-12, but it is owner-dependent (pending Eyal) with unknown latency — the same risk class the plan flags for D11. D10 gates both a P2 cutover (WP-12) and a P2 content asset (WP-07). The remaining open part is the memorial CONTENT (EYL-2 full-film + facts/dates/images), which should be promoted to a day-one owner ask alongside D1/D6/D11 in WP-09's parallel owner track, not left implicit — otherwise it can stall the gated go-live. The slug, however, is CLOSED in code: live re-verification (team_100, 2026-06-21) confirms the **canonical memorial route = `/eyal-amit/mokesh-dahiman/` (served 200)**, while `/about/moksha/` and `/mokesh-dahiman/` are **301 SOURCES that redirect to it** — do NOT freeze `/about/moksha/` as the canonical/301 target (that would be a 2-hop chain). The 301 target and the schema node must both use `/eyal-amit/mokesh-dahiman/`.
- Route inventory for the machine layer is incomplete — several real published routes get no schema/meta/title/OG. The live 301 mu-plugin and seeders prove these 200 routes exist: /shows/, /repair/, /bags/, /stand-floor/, /stands-storage/, /books/vekatavta/, /books/kushi-blantis/, `/eyal-amit/mokesh-dahiman/` (the canonical memorial route; `/about/moksha/` is a 301 SOURCE → it, NOT a 200), /press/, and the 48 /qr/qr*/ pages. WP-02 enumerates only home/treatment/method/sound-healing/lessons/eyal-amit/contact/faq/books/shop/blog; WP-04's title/meta/OG list is similar. These commerce-adjacent and heritage routes will ship with the theme's tagline-fallback meta description (confirmed: wave2-w2-09.php gives non-front pages only the bloginfo tagline) and zero OG/canonical — they become thin/duplicate-description pages at cutover. Either enumerate them in WP-02/WP-04 or explicitly mark them noindex/out-of-scope; right now they are silently neither.

### 🟡 Refinements / sequencing
- WP-04 acceptance criteria for the AI-bot robots policy are too vague to verify and the verification is mis-sequenced. 'Re-verify exact UA tokens at build' plus 'verify CDN/WAF doesn't 403 the AI UAs' (in WP-12) means the single highest-leverage GEO lever (being crawlable by OAI-SearchBot/PerplexityBot/Claude-SearchBot) has no concrete pass/fail test and its only real verification happens at the very last gated step. Add a concrete acceptance criterion: post-cutover, curl each named UA against 3 live URLs and assert HTTP 200 (not 403/blocked) — and run it the day robots.txt goes live, not bundled into the 2-4 week monitoring window.
- WP-10 is rated effort H and sits in P3, but it depends on WP-02+WP-03 and is gated by D12 (unverified keyword volumes). Spending the single largest content effort (10+ clustered articles) while D12 is open risks sizing content against SERP-inferred (admittedly uncertain) demand. The plan should add an explicit decision-gate sequencing note: do the GSC/Keyword-Planner verification (D12) BEFORE committing WP-10 word-count/article-count, or scope WP-10 phase-1 to only the 3 spokes that are already justified by the sleep-apnea/cbDIDG/disambiguation strategy (which don't need volume data) and defer the rest.
- WP-05 and WP-07 both touch the same below-fold media performance budget (lazy-loading, LCP) and the same assets, and WP-07's facade work overlaps WP-05's LCP pass — but the 48 raw-iframe QR pages fall in the seam between them and are owned by neither. Consider explicitly assigning the QR-iframe performance/transcript remediation to one WP so it isn't dropped.
- WP-08 'OMIT the offers node where price is מחיר לפי התאמה' has no acceptance criterion for how the code distinguishes a real numeric price from the fallback in the ea_product_price meta. If the meta stores the literal Hebrew string vs a number, the emit logic needs a defined rule (is_numeric check) — state it, or the build will guess and may emit a fake/zero Offer, the exact failure the plan says to avoid.
- The plan never assigns ownership of the actual server-side CF7 activation, SMTP/email deliverability, and spam protection (honeypot/Turnstile) for the YMYL lead form. WP-01 assumes these as 'confirmed' (D7) but they are ops/hosting tasks on uPress, not theme commits, and form spam on a contact form is near-certain. This should be a named dependency on the WP-12/ops track.
